titleStmt.title: SII 24.512: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 512. (A.R. No. 35 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers an endowment of land, by purchase from Paramēśvara-Bhaṭṭar Ratnagirināthar of Kīḻaipperuṅgāvūr alias Lakkaṇadaṉṉayakapuram in the eastern portion of Maḻaināḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, on the northern bank’ (of the Kāvērī) in Tiruchchirāppaḷḷi-uśāvaḍi, by the Traivarṇika Śrīvaishṇavas and Naḍimiṇṭi Koṇḍu-Cheṭṭi and Mula-aṅgit-Timmu-Cheṭṭi for a special offering for the service of chanting the Iyaṟpā (the third thousand of the Nālāyira-divyaprabandham). The record is here built in. The details of date viz., Śaka 1514, Nandana, Karkaṭaka, śu. 14, Thursday, Uttirāḍam correspond to 1592, A.D. July 13, Thursday, ·37, f.d.n. ·12,

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ śrīrāmajayam traivarṇa śrīvayiṣṇavāḷ poliyūṭṭu svastiśrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvaran śrīvirapradāpa śrīviraveṅkaṭapati devamahārāyar pṛthivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 5 100 10 4 Itaṉ meṟcellā niṉṟa naṉtana samvatsarattu karkkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu catu rdaśiyum
bṛhaspativāramum peṟṟa Uttirāṭa nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇḍikulāśani vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvarāviti vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkantiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅga nāthadevar śrībhaṇḍārattukku tiruvaraṅkantiruppati traivarṇika śrīvayiṣṇavāḷum naṭimiṇṭi koṇṭu ceṭṭiyum mula Āṅkit timmu ceṭṭi Uḷpaṭṭāru mo
m deṇḍan samarppittu poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . Aṭiyoṅkaḷuṭaiya Upaiyamāka Iyalpācciṟappukkaṭṭaḷai poliyūṭṭāka kuṭutta tiriccirāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi vaṭakarai rācarācavaḷa nāṭṭu maḻai nāṭu kiḻaimuṟiyil kiḻaipperuṅkāvūrāṉa lekkaṇa teṇāyakkapurattu paramecura paṭṭar Irattiṉakirinātar kaiyyil koyil paṇṭārattil śāsanam paṇṇik koṇṭa vakaiyil Aṭi
yoṅkaḷ mutal Iṭṭu kaṭṭaḷaikku koṇṭu cetta rūpāy 1(1/4) kku rekaippaṭi poṉ 2 10 5- kku poliyūṭṭuk kaṭṭaḷaiBuilt in
Digital edition of SII 24.512 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
